summary: CloneCratesio is a high-performance local mirror of Rust crates.io registry. It downloads and caches crate files with sidecar metadata generation and exposes Prometheus metrics for observability. It supports loose-file and bundle storage models, incremental updates, and audit logging via JSONL manifests. The project includes a Python wrapper to clone/update the crates.io-index and invoke the Go downloader, a Go downloader with concurrency and bundling, a sidecar generator, and a bundle extractor.
ecosystem_role: infrastructure component providing local crates.io mirroring, metadata generation, and observability for Aptlantis Rust ecosystem workflows
canonical_sources_used: Docs/CloneCrates.io - Technical Q&A and Implementation Guide.md
capabilities: sidecar metadata generation (per-crate JSON or aggregated JSONL)
interfaces: Prometheus metrics HTTP endpoint (:9090 by default)
produces: local crates mirror (loose files or bundles)
depends_on: Go runtime (for downloader and sidecar tools)
missing_pieces: Integration test harness for end-to-end bundle and extraction workflows
GitHub Actions workflows for build, test, lint, and release
Grafana dashboard examples for Prometheus metrics
Sample manifests and diff tooling documentation
next_steps: Add integration tests covering bundle creation and extraction end-to-end
Implement CI workflows for automated build and test
Develop Grafana dashboards for monitoring download metrics
Document sample manifests and provide diff tools
Prototype GUI for monitoring downloader progress and metrics
potential_improvements: Enhance retry and error handling robustness
Add support for alternative storage backends
Refine concurrency tuning and resource usage
documentation_outputs: Docs/CloneCrates.io - Technical Q&A and Implementation Guide.md
notes: Project is mature and stable with 100% completion relative to intended scope
Operational completeness is full for the single operator use case
Product completeness is lower due to missing GUI and broader user polish
Documentation is comprehensive and aligned with current implementation
Concurrency defaults standardized to 128 threads for performance
Bundle mode defaults to 'only' to avoid silent duplicate storage
Prometheus metrics and pprof profiling enabled by default on :9090
Manifest is a JSONL audit log capturing download metadata
Sidecar generation supports both loose-file and JSONL bundle modes
Python wrapper automates index cloning and downloader invocation
Open issues focus on testing, CI, contributor docs, and UI tooling
